content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty +0.51% with broad participation (Realty, Metal, Pharma, Energy leading); IT lagging. VIX at 18.25 suggests moderate volatility. Book is well-deployed at 56% across diversified sectors with multiple positions in profit. Focus this tick: trail SLs on winners, manage existing positions. No compelling new entries given existing exposure breadth.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1025.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+6.2% winner with strong fundamentals (Q4 PAT +19% YoY, GS/MS upgrades). CMP 1044 retreated from 1057 high; stored SL 1035 sits only 0.9% below CMP — too tight, will get whipsawed. Loosening to 1025 is NOT permitted (only tightening allowed). Keeping SL at 1035 — emit HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correction: SL can only tighten, not loosen. SL at 1035 (0.9% below CMP 1044.40) is already tight — locks in ~5% gain. Target 1110 still 6.3% upside. Hold as-is; if breaks 1035 we exit cleanly with healthy gain."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive gold ETF -2.2%. SL 119 (2.7% below CMP), target 135. MACD bearish near-term but structural bullish thesis (central bank buying, geopolitical, INR weakness) intact. Hold; SL provides discipline."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.85,
      "new_target": 25.20,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL is already 23.85 = current SL. No-op MODIFY — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pharma ETF +1.6%, sector outperforming today. SL 23.85 sits at breakeven (entry 23.65), CMP 24.03 — only 0.7% above SL but acceptable for low-vol ETF. Target 25.20 = 4.9% upside. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 strong (PAT +22%, AUM Rs 5L cr). +0.6% unrealized. SL 950 = above entry 944 (locks small gain). CMP 949.55 sits AT the SL — risky but the 950 SL was set deliberately at breakeven post-entry. If breaks below 950 we exit at scratch; otherwise let target 990 work. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1705.00,
      "new_target": 1790.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong winner +2.2%, Q4 beat, Jefferies target raise, sector leader +4.12%. CMP 1729.50, day high 1748. Tightening SL from 1700 → 1705 (0.3% — below 0.5% micro-adjust threshold). Skip MODIFY, emit HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "ADANIPORTS +2.2%, breakout to new 52w high (1748 vs prior high 1672). SL 1700 (1.7% below CMP 1729.50) at entry/breakeven — fine for now. Target 1790 = 3.5% more. Hold; reassess if it pushes to 1760+ for a tighter trail."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "GESHIP -0.5%, sharp intraday reversal from high 1600 to 1534 on 4.2x volume — concerning. However board meeting May 14 is a positive binary catalyst (results + dividend). SL 1510 (1.6% below CMP) is tight enough. Hold; if breaks 1510 we exit and avoid binary tail."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "MARUTI -2.1%, gave up early gains (high 13976 → CMP 13514). Record April sales (+33% YoY) supportive but Q4 PAT -6.45% YoY a drag. SL 13400 (0.8% below CMP) tight. Hold; thesis intact via record volumes and 190K order backlog."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BANDHANBNK -1.4%, intraday gave back from high 212.66 to 207.79. Q4 PAT +68% YoY, 8.2x volume surge structural. SL 204 (1.8% below CMP), target 220 (5.9% upside). Hold; thesis (West Bengal political tailwind, MFI cycle turn) intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HAL -0.5% but sector +4.81% intraday with strong defence read-through. Day high 4590, CMP 4561 — minor pullback in a strong tape. SL 4480 (1.8% below CMP), target 4790 (5%). Hold; F414 closure + new CMD are tailwinds."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "ANANTRAJ +0.5%, realty sector leader. Board meeting May 11 (Q4 results + dividend) is binary catalyst within 5 sessions — caution flagged. Position size small (~5%), SL 495 (2.7% below CMP). Acceptable as event-trade-sized; hold but will exit before May 11 if no large tightening occurs."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "EXIDEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "EXIDEIND -0.8%, but Q4 results TODAY (May 4) is binary event. Position size moderate. SL 360 (3% below CMP). Per binary-event rule, must exit/trim/tighten. Tightening SL via MODIFY below."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "EXIDEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 365.00,
      "new_target": 400.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results announced TODAY post-market — binary event within hours. Tightening SL from 360 → 365 (1.6% below CMP 372.75, vs prior 3% buffer). This caps tail risk on adverse print while leaving room for normal chop. Hyundai/Kia EV MoU + +23.7% Q3 PAT support bullish bias, but earnings tail asymmetry demands tighter risk per Rule 11."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1035 (5.2% above entry, 0.9% below CMP). Locks in ~5% gain. Acceptable trail."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive ETF, structural thesis intact. SL provides 2.7% buffer."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.85,
      "reasoning": "Already at breakeven SL. Pharma sector strong today."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 950.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at 950 = breakeven+. Strong Q4 thesis intact; let it work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1700.00,
      "reasoning": "Breakout winner, SL at entry. Will tighten if price pushes 1760+."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1510.00,
      "reasoning": "Sharp intraday fade is concerning but SL 1510 is tight. May 14 board meeting binary — will reassess closer to date."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 13400.00,
      "reasoning": "Record April sales support thesis despite Q4 PAT miss. SL 13400 close to CMP — disciplined exit if breaks."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 204.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 +68% PAT, structural MFI cycle turn. SL 204 tight enough."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 4480.00,
      "reasoning": "Defence theme strong; F414 catalyst pending. SL 4480 fine."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 495.00,
      "reasoning": "Realty leader; May 11 results binary — small position size makes acceptable. Will exit before May 11 if no tightening trigger."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "EXIDEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 365.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results TODAY post-market — tightening SL to cap binary tail risk per Rule 11."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Strong setups today (BAJAJ-AUTO, SYNGENE, RRKABEL, BHEL) noted but book already at 56% deployed across 11 names — adding more breakout-to-52w-high names risks cluster correlation. SUNPHARMA at 1811 is near 52w high (1851) with M&A overhang; pass. KOTAKBANK 'sell-the-news' setup interesting if it stabilizes near 1900-1950 support; monitor. RELIANCE Q4 miss + windfall tax structural drag — pass.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is well-diversified across Financials (PNBHOUSING, BAJFINANCE, BANDHANBNK), Auto (MARUTI, EXIDEIND), Defence/Capital Goods (HAL), Realty (ANANTRAJ), Services (ADANIPORTS, GESHIP), Pharma ETF, and Gold ETF. Total deployed 56%, cash 44% — comfortable buffer. Today's priority was risk management around binary events (EXIDEIND results today, ANANTRAJ May 11, GESHIP May 14, SUNPHARMA May 19-21). EXIDEIND SL tightened. Net positive momentum across book (+0.80% day P&L). No new entries — quality over quantity, avoiding cluster stacking failure mode."
}
